# Feature Specification: Beta Spec

**Branch**: `003-beta`
**Status**: Draft

## Summary

A placeholder spec used to drive the multi-spec phase-collision regression
test. It carries no real coordinates and exists only as on-disk fixture input.
Its `## Phase 1` header is IDENTICAL to the alpha spec's — the collision the
parent-scoped find must defeat.

## Requirements

- FR-001: Two specs sharing a phase number MUST mirror to distinct Subtasks.
